title: Helix Design System – UI Framework from Ideagen
content: Helix from Directories: Components: Helix Design System is a framework for cohesive user experiences across Ideagen's products. It includes core elements like colors, typography, guidelines, and UI components. Design System ensures consistency in Ideagen's design language, with guidelines for accessibility and responsiveness. Helix offers clear documentation and resources for seamless implementation, driving excellence in user experience. Accessibility Color System Elevation Icons Illustrations Layout Patterns Tokens Typography Voice and Tone Accordion Alert banner Avatar Badges Breadcrumb Button Cards Checkbox Data table Date picker Empty state Link Menus Modal Page header Pagination Progress bar Radio button Search Select Sidebar Slider Switch Tabs Tag Text field Tooltip
